chunks.text: Course: EE 290G | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 290G. Advanced Topics in Electrical Engineering: Advanced Topics in Mems, Microsensors, and Microactuators Catalog Description: The 290 courses cover current topics of research interest in electrical engineering. The course content may vary from semester to semester. Units: 1-3 Also Offered As: ELENG 290G Related Areas: Micro/Nano Electro Mechanical Systems (MEMS) Prerequisites: Consent of instructor. Formats: Spring: 1-3 hours of lecture per week Fall: 1-3 hours of lecture per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: No Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
